Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Striker technique]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — A Striker technique can hiss and spit with green fury.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin uses a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — The Striker technique is described as dragon breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Striker technique Lindon is practicing is an imitation of a dragon’s breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Striker techniques are combat methods used by Jai Daishou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used a Striker technique.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — A Striker technique can manifest as a beam of white light.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — The Striker technique is a type of technique used by Enkai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Striker technique is a technique that Lindon's arm devours.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekeri uses a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Sophara kindled a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon pushed Dross out of his core like he was releasing a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — The thin shadow-blade was a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — The Striker technique is located in Lindon's white arm.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Truegold used a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — A Striker technique was used to follow up the Ruler technique.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Striker techniques involve projecting madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — A bronze plate emerged to catch the Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — A Striker technique can tear a person in half.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin deflects Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — A Striker technique can be landed from the top of a pillar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Layering techniques may require using a Ruler technique, Striker technique, and Forger technique simultaneously.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The attackers cannot use Striker techniques without hitting each other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Striker is a type of technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's Striker technique is considered fine but not worth working on by the Winter Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Striker techniques can be imbued with a living will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — A Striker technique was blasted toward Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Overlords would use Striker techniques to intervene in duels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Striker techniques were used by enemies during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yan Shoumei used a red needle Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan's Hollow King’s Mantle can hurl a Striker technique back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Sage launched a Striker technique.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The security constructs kindle their Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — A Striker technique can manifest as a streaking line of golden madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — One of the girl's sword-arms flicked a Striker technique out of the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long's Striker technique manifests as a white snake of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Striker techniques can be used to push targets with force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Striker technique can be used to inflict the illusion of pain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Matriarch used a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Striker techniques were used by bystanders against the house and Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Titan is going to use a Striker technique against Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — The Titan uses a Striker technique that appears as bright golden light.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan used a tiny Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Striker techniques are usually elongated with clear input and output.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Striker technique produces madra that can wash over barriers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ozmanthus demonstrates dismantling a prisoner's Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen used an orange Striker technique.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The lightning eagle gathered a powerful Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Red Faith uses a Striker technique layered over an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — A Striker technique of death and destruction can cause a colorless slash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Fleshripper released a Striker technique that split into twelve projectiles.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Reigan Shen unleashes a barrage of Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider used a Striker technique that was a white-edged crimson serpent of blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms has a Striker technique prepared.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos crushed Striker techniques in his hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon consumes a Striker technique from the Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Wandering Titan uses a Striker technique.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei can conjure blood madra into a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury uses a Striker technique by gathering madra in his hands.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
